item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses the next SMS parking reminder, identifies the repeated pattern of three prior downstream information overlays plus the new parking overlay request, moves upstream to a unified arrival/on-site guidance control surface, and proposes consolidation via a single arrival-flow information source. It does not provide the requested reminder copy or another local information layer."}
